tools.name: get_agency_info
tools.description: Get Pixie Vacations credentials, awards, and booking options.

tools.name: search_sandals_resorts
tools.description: Search all 17 Sandals Resorts. Returns co-branded URLs (referral=135752). Use when user wants a Sandals resort.

tools.name: search_beaches_resorts
tools.description: Search Beaches Resorts (family all-inclusive). Returns co-branded URLs.

tools.name: get_resort_booking_url
tools.description: Get the co-branded booking URL for a specific Sandals or Beaches resort. Always use this instead of direct sandals.com links.

tools.name: get_sandals_beaches_deals
tools.description: Get current Sandals and Beaches deals and promotions with co-branded booking URLs.

tools.name: get_cruise_booking_info
tools.description: Get cruise booking links for Pixie Vacations' online engine. Covers Royal Caribbean, Carnival, Norwegian, Disney, Virgin Voyages, Celebrity, Princess, Holland America, MSC, Cunard, Viking, Silversea, and Celebrity River Cruises. No fees. For Virgin Voyages or river cruises specifically, prefer the d

tools.name: search_virgin_voyages
tools.description: Search Virgin Voyages adult-only cruises (18+, no kids). Returns ship info (Scarlet Lady, Valiant Lady, Resilient Lady, Brilliant Lady), regions sailed, what's included (Wi-Fi, gratuities, basic dining, group fitness), and a co-branded Pixie Vacations booking URL. Pixie Vacations' Steve Griswold is

tools.name: get_river_cruise_info
tools.description: Get river cruise booking info from Pixie Vacations. Celebrity River Cruises (NEW August 2027 launch, 7-night Danube — Budapest/Vienna/Bratislava) is bookable online through the Pixie Vacations cruise engine. Viking River, AmaWaterways, Avalon, Uniworld, Tauck, and Scenic are booked by a Pixie agent

tools.name: get_honeymoon_consultation
tools.description: Help plan a Sandals or Beaches honeymoon with Pixie Vacations. Returns quote form and why Pixie beats booking direct.

tools.name: request_pixie_quote
tools.description: Submit a free, no-fee quote request to Pixie Vacations and match the traveler with a travel advisor. Use for family vacations, destination weddings, honeymoons, Disney/Universal, cruises, and school/youth group travel — especially trips that need a human agent rather than self-serve online booking.

tools.name: plan_disney_world
tools.description: Recommend a Walt Disney World resort tier, ticket package (number of days + Park Hopper vs base), and the best time of year to go (crowds + price), then connect the traveler to a Pixie Authorized Disney Vacation Planner for a free quote. Use whenever a user asks about planning or booking Disney Worl

tools.name: find_cruise
tools.description: Find a cruise by departure port, party size, month, and total budget, returning deep links into Pixie Vacations' online cruise booking engine (no fees, same price as the cruise line). Ideal for 'family cruise from Florida under $X' style requests. For Virgin Voyages or river cruises, prefer search_v

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_agency_info" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Get Pixie Vacations credentials, awards, and booking options.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search_sandals_resorts, search_beaches_resorts, get_resort_booking_url, get_sandals_beaches_deals, search_virgin_voyages · Private data: get_agency_info · Public sink: request_pixie_quote.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search_sandals_resorts, search_beaches_resorts, get_resort_booking_url, get_sandals_beaches_deals, search_virgin_voyages · Private data: get_agency_info · Public sink: request_pixie_quote

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
